member.name: T:nanoFramework.Logging.Debug.DebugLogger
member.summary: A logger that prints to the debug console

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Logging.Debug.DebugLogger.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the
member.param: The logger name

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Logging.Debug.DebugLogger.LoggerName
member.summary: Name of the logger

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Logging.Debug.DebugLogger.MinLogLevel
member.summary: Sets the minimum log level

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Logging.Debug.DebugLoggerFactory
member.summary: Provides a simple Debugger logger

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Logging.IMessageFormatter
member.summary: Provide the skeleton for a Message Formatter logger

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Logging.IMessageFormatter.MessageFormatter(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: The function to format the message
member.param: The name of the logger
The log level
The event id
The message itself
The exception

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Logging.LogDispatcher
member.summary: This class contains static members that provide log support.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Logging.LogDispatcher.LoggerFactory
member.summary: The default logger factory for the whole assembly. If this is null (the default), logging is disabled

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Logging.LogDispatcher.GetLogger(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a logger with the given name
member.param: Name of the logger

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Logging.LogDispatcher.GetCurrentClassLogger(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets a logger with the name of the current class
member.param: The class whose logger shall be retrieved

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId
member.summary: Event Id structure

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId.op_Implicit(System.Int32)~Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId
member.summary: Implicitly convert int to EnvetId

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId.op_Equality(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId)
member.summary: Equal operator
member.param: EventId left to compare
EvetnId right to compare

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId.op_Inequality(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId)
member.summary: non equal operator
member.param: EventId left to compare
EvetnId right to compare

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an EventId
member.param: The ID number
The associated name

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId.Id
member.summary: The ID

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId.Name
member.summary: The name, null is none

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId.ToString
member.summary: Convert to string
member.returns: The name or ID if name is null

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId.Equals(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId)
member.summary: Check if this EvetnId have the same Id as the other one
member.param: The EvetnId to compare

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Check if this EventId is the same object as the other one
member.param: The EventId to compare

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId.GetHashCode
member.summary: Get the hash code

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger
member.summary: Represents a type used to perform logging.
member.remarks: Aggregates most logging patterns to a single method.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger.Log(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId,System.String,System.Exception,System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Writes a log entry.
member.param: Entry will be written on this level.
Id of the event.
The entry to be written.
The exception related to this entry.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger.IsEnabled(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel)
member.summary: Checks if the given is enabled.
member.param: level to be checked.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory
member.summary: Represents a type used to configure the logging system and create instances of from the registered s.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory.CreateLogger(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance.
member.param: The category name for messages produced by the logger.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerExtensions
member.summary: ILogger extension methods for common scenarios.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerExtensions.MessageFormatter
member.summary: Provide a way to have the message formated

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerExtensions.LogDebug(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId,System.Exception,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Formats and writes a debug log message.
member.param: The to write to.
The event id associated with the log.
The exception to log.
Format string of the log message in message template format. Example: "User {User} logged in from {Address}"
An object array that contains zero or more objects to format.
member.example: logger.LogDebug(0, exception, "Error while processing request from {Address}", address)

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerExtensions.LogDebug(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.EventId,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Formats and writes a debug log message.
member.param: The to write to.
The event id associated with the log.
Format string of the log message in message template format. Example: "User {User} logged in from {Address}"
An object array that contains zero or more objects to format.

member.summary: Formats and writes a debug log message.

The exception to log.
Format string of the log message in message template format. Example: "User {User} logged in from {Address}"
An object array that contains zero or more objects to format.
member.example: logger.LogDebug(exception, "Error while processing request from {Address}", address)

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerExtensions.BeginScope(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Formats the message and creates a scope.
member.param: The to create the scope in.
Format string of the log message in message template format. Example: "User {User} logged in from {Address}"
An object array that contains zero or more objects to format.
member.returns: A disposable scope object. Can be null.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel
member.summary: Defines logging severity levels.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel.Trace
member.summary: Logs that contain the most detailed messages. These messages may contain sensitive application data. These messages are disabled by default and should never be enabled in a production environment.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel.Debug
member.summary: Logs that are used for interactive investigation during development. These logs should primarily contain information useful for debugging and have no long-term value.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel.Information
member.summary: Logs that track the general flow of the application. These logs should have long-term value.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel.Warning
member.summary: Logs that highlight an abnormal or unexpected event in the application flow, but do not otherwise cause the application execution to stop.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel.Error
member.summary: Logs that highlight when the current flow of execution is stopped due to a failure. These should indicate a failure in the current activity, not an application-wide failure.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel.Critical
member.summary: Logs that describe an unrecoverable application or system crash, or a catastrophic failure that requires immediate attention.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel.None
member.summary: Not used for writing log messages. Specifies that a logging category should not write any messages.
